title: 10 teas for perimenopausal women with fibrocystic breast disease
description: Cynara scolymus teas, also known as artichoke tea, has been studied for its potential benefits in managing fibrocystic breast disease (FBD). This condition is characterized by lumpy or rope-like breast tissue, often accompanied by symptoms like breast pain, tenderness, and swelling. The artichoke tea's properties, particularly its high content of cynarin and saponins, may help alleviate these symptoms.
